nodes.name: 田纳西州
nodes.summary: 田纳西州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Sprague's pipit、紅翅黑鸝，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 紅翅黑鸝
nodes.summary: 紅翅黑鸝（Red-winged blackbird，学名 Agelaius phoeniceus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括湿地、沼泽。

nodes.name: 北美洲
nodes.summary: 北美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联97种鸟类，包括紅嘴樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、加拿大雁等97种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 草沼
nodes.summary: 草沼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括黑颈天鹅、赤麻鸭、赤嘴潜鸭等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Milan, Tennessee
nodes.summary: Milan ( MY-lin) is the largest city in Gibson County, Tennessee, United States.

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 湿地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括鵲鵝、澳洲硬尾鸭、黑天鹅等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 中美洲
nodes.summary: 中美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联125种鸟类，包括大䳍、小穴䳍、灰胸穴䳍等125种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: phoeniceus | synonyms = Oriolus phoeniceus }} The red-winged blackbird (Agelaius phoeniceus) is a passerine bird of the family Icteridae found in most of North America and much of Central America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It generally prefers wetlands and inhabits both freshwater and saltwater marshes, particularly if cattail is present

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It generally prefers wetlands and inhabits both freshwater and saltwater marshes, particularly if cattail is present

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also found in dry upland areas, where it inhabits meadows, prairies, and old fields. In a large part of its distribution area, it constitutes the most abundant passerine bird in the swamps in which it nests. It is also present in areas without much water, where it inhabits open fields – often agricultural areas – and sparse deciduous forests. In the winter of 1975–1976, near Milan in western Tennessee, red-winged blackbirds were observed resting in a mixed roost that came to house 11 million individuals in January and early February in a plantation of 4.5 hectares of yellow pine (Pinus taeda) with little undergrowth
